privileged_info_summary: The task requires visiting the live, non-synthetic website 'community.torproject.org' using the Tor Browser. The user must save the TLS certificate chain to '/home/ga/Documents/target_cert_chain.pem' and a screenshot of the certificate viewer to '/home/ga/Documents/cert_viewer_screenshot.png'.
